---
title: "Blogs"
format: html
---

We are actively seeking blog entries for the new NHS-OA community!
If you have something you want to say, get in touch with us at 
[openanalytics.community@nhs.net](mailto:openanalytics.community@nhs.net) - we
can help you shape it into something really impactful and host it publicly here!

To read blogs submitted to NHS-R (our progenitor organisation), please visit
[our legacy site](https://nhsrcommunity.com/blog/)
